log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Orc — Iron Concentration (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Orc — Iron Concentration
→ Bite: [d20:7+10=17 vs AC 14] HIT! 22 damage. Orc — Iron Concentration HP: 45/67
→ Bite: [d20:9+10=19 vs AC 14] HIT! 12 damage. Orc — Iron Concentration HP: 33/67
→ Bite: [d20:14+10=24 vs AC 14] HIT! 25 damage. Orc — Iron Concentration HP: 8/67
--- Orc — Iron Concentration --- HP: 8/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: HP CRITICAL (8/67). Going invisible for survival.
ACTION: Cast Greater Invisibility (Level 4 slot, 1 remaining).
→ Orc — Iron Concentration is affected by Greater Invisibility.
══ ROUND 2 ══
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18

══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Orc — Iron Concentration --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.

→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:5+4=9 vs DC 15] FAIL!
→ 1/1 targets affected.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18 | Cond: [charmed_hp, incapacitated]
** INCAPACITATED ** Cannot take actions.
